title: populus cathayana var. cathayana
intro: Populus cathayana var. cathayana, also known as the Chinese white poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to China, characterized by its broad leaves and white or pale yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Populus cathayana var. cathayana include reducing fever, relieving coughs and bronchitis, and soothing skin irritations. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions for use in treating various ailments.
